design_plan: Python RNG Execution: seed derived from title+kind+audience+generated_at to select workflow-command-center hero, Geist font, gapless-bento-grid + workflow-playbook-timeline + decision-matrix components, GSAP hover-physics and image-scale-fade-scroll. AIDA Check: hero (attention), market proof + bento (interest), long-form guide + media (desire), CTA band (action). Font Selection: Geist. Hero Math Verification: clamp headline sized for 2–3 lines at max-width 1100px. Bento Density Verification: grid-auto-flow: dense present. GSAP Motion Selection: guarded hover and scroll fades. Label Sweep & Button Check: black primary CTA, high-contrast secondary CTA verified.
headline: Meta Display AI assistant for smart glasses and wearable workflows

site_brief.audience: people evaluating AI assistants for Meta smart glasses and display-style wearable workflows
site_brief.goal: Create an indexable SEO use-case page in the /use-cases/ cluster. Target the practical query 'Meta Display AI assistant', show the exact job-to-be-done, and explain how Super can perform the workflow with real computer use and a reusable computer-use cache. Include sibling use-case links so the cluster feels intentional, crawlable, and useful. Add a long-form operator playbook with how-to steps, setup checklist, realistic limits, confirmation moments, and examples that a reader can act on immediately.
site_brief.title: Meta Display AI assistant
site_brief.use_case_intent: show how Super can become the action layer for hands-free Meta Display workflows beyond simple voice answers

summary: A practical, field-tested guide for people evaluating AI assistants on Meta smart glasses and display-style wearables. Learn how Super acts as the action layer behind hands-free prompts, operating real computers, reusing a computer-use cache, and turning glanceable display moments into durable workflows.
